question: Where do I initially keep my old sneakers?

retrieval_results.context:
User seeks tips to keep sneakers clean and fresh while stored
The user stores old sneakers under the bed, leading to odor
User will use a shoe rack with individual compartments to store sneakers separately and organized
User has a few pairs of shoes hidden in the closet that haven't been worn in ages
The user will drop off the old sneakers at a cobbler this weekend for polishing and conditioning
User will organize closet this weekend to get rid of old sneakers using a shoe rack
User may use storage containers such as bins or baskets to store socks, accessories, or out-of-season shoes
User plans to take inventory of their shoe collection
User plans to organize closet by type, grouping boots, sneakers, and other shoes together
The user plans to donate old dress shoes to a local charity thrift store on Saturday
